title: Girls Just Want to Have Fun
why_this_song: Girls Just Want to Have Fun by Cyndi Lauper (1983) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 32 times; first heard in: "And girls, they wanna have fun"
Appears 13 times; first heard in: "That's all they really want"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "When the workin' day is done"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "When the workin' day is done"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "My mother says, "When you gonna live your life right?""

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Oh girls, girls just wanna have fun
They just wanna, they just wanna (girls)
They just want, they just wanna (girls just wanna have fun)
When the workin' day is done
Oh girls, they wanna have fun
Oh girls just wanna have fun (girls, they want)

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "girls" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "girls" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "want" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "want" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I come home, in the mornin' light
Some boys take a beautiful girl

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Oh momma dear, we're not the fortunate ones
Oh girls, they wanna have fun
When the workin' day is done

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Girls Just Want to Have Fun" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Girls Just Want to Have Fun" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Girls Just Want to Have Fun" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Girls Just Want to Have Fun", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Girls Just Want to Have Fun" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Girls Just Want to Have Fun" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
